sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n24828" key="dia/qura" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διάθῠρα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ων</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, <sense id="n24828.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lattice across the doorway</tr_> of a Greek house, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vitr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.7.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
